title: Forward Pass — Issue 7 (Jul 16, 2026)
summary: 1 paper — Quiet day for tabular ML: 49 candidates screened, only one cleared the relevance bar.

title: Forward Pass — Issue 6 (Jul 15, 2026)
summary: 2 papers — GRAFT reframes table retrieval in data lakes as graph matching, gaining ~8-11% over prior retrievers on Spider/BIRD.

title: Forward Pass — Issue 5 (Jul 14, 2026)
summary: 4 papers — Graph foundation models are borrowing tabular ICL backbones: GTAlign aligns graph structure to a TabPFNv2.5/LimiX-16M input format for in-context node/graph classification.
